posts.text:
I don’t actually agree with all of this analysis (I don’t think AIPAC wants Biss to win) but this is the kind of ruthlessness the left needs to engage in if the goal is to actually win and not just be the best people


B L A K E L E Y™℠©® LLC (@_iamblakeley)

The primary for IL-09 is on Tuesday, March 17th. Kat Abughazaleh is currently polling in a close second place. If Bushra Amiwala drops out and endorses Abughazaleh, she has a chance to win. Please, @bushraamiwala drop out.

Video
  





—

This may be the most delusional man alive


Ari Fleischer (@AriFleischer)

Today’s media cheer against the US, overstate enemy abilities, understate ours and paint a picture that the US is losing, while we’re winning. It’s more true today as they cheer against Trump in Iran. 

Within 10 days weeks of this 2001 NYT doozy saying our military efforts in Afghanistan were bogged down, the key city of Mazar e Sharif fell to the US and our ally the Northern Alliance, and Kabul fell days later.

This st

Major U.S. companies now on Iran’s target, according the the IRGC


Drop Site (@DropSiteNews)

🚨 BREAKING: IRGC warns major U.S. corporations in region to evacuate; list of companies and locations included below

🔺Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC):

 “We warn the American regime to evacuate all American industries in the region. We ask people living near industrial factories in which Americans hold shares to leave those areas so they are not harmed.”

An accompanying graphic circul

Absolutely incredible. AIPAC now throwing money behind a left wing candidate in Chicago who can’t win but has some organic traction, hoping to draw votes away from Abughazelah and Biss

Video

She responds here and tells them to get lost


Bushra Amiwala (@bushraamiwala)

A message to AIPAC: stick to funding Laura Fine and Daniel Biss, this is a cheap attempt to smear my name.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/bushraamiwala/status/2032913115537448978#m
Just to abundantly clear: AIPAC is doing this without Amiwala’s consent. Their aim is to boost her enough to draw votes away from candidates ahead of her and thus elect Laura Fine

Why is the strait closed? Once we figure that out, should be fairly easy to re-open it


David Sacks (@DavidSacks)

This is a smart strategy. Thanks to President Trump, the U.S. is energy independent. The countries that actually depend on Gulf oil should apply pressure to reopen the strait.





— https://nitter.net/DavidSacks/status/2032922393014940106#m

NEWS: The man who rammed his explosives-laden truck into a Michigan synagogue today was named Ayman Ghazaleh, according to a source familiar w/ the situation. Ghazaleh posted photos overnight of his fam. members, including young children, who were killed in a recent Israeli attack on the town of...

It was. And a cynical, calculated & shameful one at that.

Hearing this from a news outlet that called the famine in Gaza a hoax is just too much. For one allegation, no actual evidence or even victims is required. For the other, even as we can see it w/ our own eyes, & hear it from doctors & aid...
I would imagine the Gulf States are not thrilled at the U.S. for targeting a desalination plant, if the claim that they did is true

Democrats and the American people broadly are so lucky that the people on this app have self-marginalized themselves into whatever you guys think you’re doing here. 

Deeply unserious. (Also, nice scoop here, idiot. I’ve talked about this a ton.)

Who is flexing? Does being on this site just automatically turn you into an asshole? Where’s this shot coming from? “My bartender” is a very common term. 

I actually knew/know the other bartender Ned much better, Graham was his backup. And this was like 15-20 years ago.

My now-15 year old gave me this haircut when she was 10 during covid and she loves that it still gets circulated by my haters, though she acknowledges it’s not her best work. 

Well, it’s her best (and only) haircut. I didn’t go back for a second. 

Also: you guys are shallow, miserable people.

Jasmine Crockett’s replacement in the House

Video: Amira Hassan via X (@itsAmira_H)
Yes this can sometimes happen. My real question is did anybody here have this information. I highly doubt it.
How did he hide it from his wife for so long? Or is she a secret Nazi too?
If someone told you he hated Indian people, would you believe that?

Now let’s do one more thought exercise. You know that famous video of him singing shirtless at the wedding where you can see the skull and bones? 

Half that wedding party was Jewish. Do you think if he knew it was a Nazi tat, maybe he’d have just left his shirt on? 

Think, people. You can do it.

I gather that everyone here is 100% certain Graham Platner is a Nazi antisemite. 

I also gather you all are trapped in an epistemic chamber sealed tighter than the one around Fox News. 

So, who here actually knew that Platner’s wife is Jewish? 

And how does that influence your certainty?

You guys are sharing a poll that shows Platner slightly beating Mills among voters making less than 50k. Yes, it’s true he beats her by more among wealthier voters but why are you showing a poll showing her losing that demo to him and pretending it shows the opposite?

I’m a proud country boy myself, what I meant is that basically all elected officials with accents who are white are Republicans. 

They all have progressives in their districts but not enough to elect a Dem
Cotton: "Israel faced an existential risk and they were prepared to strike Iran alone. If that happened, Iran was very likely to target our troops. That may address the question of 'why now.'"

This is a recognition from war supporters that the Khanna-Massie war powers resolution has momentum 

Last week Gottheimer wanted no resolution at all

If you didn't catch this, the reference to Tom Morley from this Kurdish Imam means that he is calling Reza Pahlavi out as a cuck. 

MAGA/4chan politics are now truly hegemonic.
Don't know why I can't get over this lying
The rather salacious reference the holy man makes is to this scandal
15,000 targets struck in Iran, Hegseth says; Lebanon is near a “breaking point”; U.S. temporarily lifts Russian oil sanctions (by Drop Site News)

Behind the Bombs, New Details Emerge on Iran’s Infiltration of Israel (by Jeremy Scahill). As arrests grow in Israel, internal Iranian intelligence materials reviewed by Drop Site shed light on Tehran’s clandestine attempts to turn Israeli citizens into spies.
UN says 3.2 million displaced in Iran; 40+ senators press Hegseth over Iran school bombing; Drone strikes in Sudan kill dozens of civilians (by Drop Site News)

Rescue Efforts in Tehran After a Triple Strike Hit Apartment Buildings, Killing 40 (by mahmoud aslan). “Every time we lifted a stone, we increased our sense that we might succeed in saving a life, or that we might find someone who could not be saved.”

NEW POLL: Majority of Americans Believe Trump Launched Iran War to Cover Up Epstein Scandal. A new Drop Site/Zeteo/Data For Progress survey also finds likely American voters are split on whether Trump is more responsive to the American people or to Israel.
Over 1,000 children injured in Iran; Unprecedented 400M barrels of oil reserves slated for release; Death and displacement mount in Lebanon amid Israeli assault (by Drop Site News)

In Tehran, Iranians Struggle to Breathe After Israeli Oil Facility Strikes (by Ariya Farahmand). "By the time we finally packed our bags and locked the door, our fingernails were caked in chemical grime, and our lungs were burning just from breathing inside our own living room."

Trump Might Want to End the War. Iran Won’t Do It on His Terms. (by Jeremy Scahill). Iran says the U.S. and Israel underestimated its military capacity and will to fight, as Trump careens toward a quagmire.
40 killed in strike on Tehran; Trump says Iran war “very complete, pretty much” while Hegseth promises “most intense day of strikes”; Quadcopters in Haiti (by Drop Site News)

Ground Troops, Airstrikes, and Displacement: No Guarantee of Safety in Lebanon With Relentless Israeli Assaults (by Lylla Younes). As Lebanon’s strained shelter system struggles to cope, Israel is focused on “collective punishment” and pitting the Lebanese government against Hezbollah.

Iran Weighs Tactical Shift in Persian Gulf Strikes While Intensifying Attacks on Israel (by Jeremy Scahill). A senior Iranian official told Drop Site that Iran has achieved most of its tactical aims against U.S. military infrastructure, but warned it will still respond to attacks launched from Arab states.
Oil prices yoyo as refineries hit and shipments halt; White House won’t rule out a draft in Iran war; Trump bails out Ticketmaster (by Drop Site News)

Iran Denies Asking Trump to Talk; Official Says No Negotiations Will Be Considered Until a New Supreme Leader Is Named (by Jeremy Scahill). A senior Iranian official told Drop Site that despite U.S. claims that Iran’s military capacity is decimated, Tehran is expanding its retaliatory strikes with more powerful weapons.
U.S.-Israeli bombardment of Iran enters 7th day; Hundreds of thousands displaced in Lebanon amid Israeli assault; Trump fires Noem (by Drop Site News)

Dozens Killed and Thousands Displaced in Growing Pakistan-Afghan Border Conflict (by Emran Feroz). Amid the U.S.-Israel war on Iran, Pakistan's recent assertiveness against the Taliban also serves as a message to the West.
Trump went to war to distract from his JE scandal, according to a majority of Americans in a new survey we commissioned.
The Gulf Arab countries are losing their minds
Confirmed: US missiles struck the girls school in Minab
What actually happened in Minneapolis
JD Vance is just lying
New Epstein files released, batch 8
App couldn’t abide this Epstein post
Jasmine Crockett is a new kind of corporate Democrat, and she’s running for Senate in Texas
